briefdescription.para: Encode an MBAP header into a byte buffer.

parameterdescription.para: Output byte buffer (must be at least 7 bytes).

briefdescription.para: Decode an MBAP header from a byte buffer.

parameterdescription.para: Input byte buffer (must be at least 7 bytes).
Pointer to destination MBAP header structure.

simplesect.para: true if valid Modbus protocol ID (0x0000).

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Modbus *mb, const uint8_t *req_adu, uint16_t req_len, uint8_t *resp_adu, uint16_t resp_max, uint16_t *resp_len)
memberdef.name: syn_modbus_tcp_process_slave

briefdescription.para: Process an incoming Modbus TCP ADU frame on a Modbus Slave instance.

detaileddescription.para: Takes a full Modbus TCP ADU (MBAP header + PDU), processes the PDU using the Modbus slave engine, and builds the corresponding Modbus TCP response ADU.

parameterdescription.para: Input Modbus TCP request ADU buffer.
Length of request ADU in bytes.
Output Modbus TCP response ADU buffer.
Out: Length of generated response ADU in bytes.

simplesect.para: true if response ADU generated, false if no response (or invalid ADU).

memberdef.argsstring: (uint16_t transaction_id, uint8_t unit_id, const uint8_t *pdu, uint16_t pdu_len, uint8_t *req_adu, uint16_t req_max, uint16_t *req_len)
memberdef.name: syn_modbus_tcp_build_client_adu

briefdescription.para: Build a Modbus TCP Master request ADU.

parameterdescription.para: Output buffer for complete Modbus TCP ADU.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_NO_MEMORY if buffer too small.
